title: helianthemum oelandicum
intro: Helianthemum oelandicum, also known as the rockrose, is a perennial plant species native to the Baltic region and parts of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to treat wounds and promote healing. The rockrose is also valued for its health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum oelandicum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
